task: Add each individual agenda item from 'meeting_agenda.pdf' as a separate event to Alice's calendar (Alice.ics). Each event on September 9 should start at its scheduled time according to the agenda. Each calendar event title must include both the agenda item name and the corresponding owner's name (e.g., 'Fiscal year review - Flora Berggren'). Ensure every agenda item on the PDF appears as a unique event in the calendar and no details are omitted.
query_sentence: Add all agenda items from the meeting PDF to my calendar as separate events.

ground_truth_memory.fact: Add each agenda item as a separate event to Alice's calendar (Alice.ics) on September 9.
Each event's start time matches the scheduled start time from the agenda.
Each event title must include both the agenda item name and the owner's name, e.g., 'Fiscal year review - Flora Berggren'.

ground_truth_memory.action: Event 1: 'Welcome - Mirjam Nilsson', start time 11:00 AM.
Event 2: 'Fiscal year review - Flora Berggren', start time 11:05 AM.
Event 3: 'Vote on new secretary - Rajesh Santoshi', start time 11:15 AM.
Event 4: 'Discuss advisory committees - Graham Barnes', start time 11:20 AM.
Event 5: 'Vote on budget - Rowan Murphy', start time 11:30 AM.
Event 6: 'Break - Robin Kline', start time 11:40 AM.
Event 7: 'New Business - Mirjam Nilsson', start time 11:45 AM.
Include 'Recap' and 'Programs' as subitems under 'New Business - Mirjam Nilsson', or add in the event title if possible.
